use_codes.desc: METHOD OF REVERSING THE ANTICOAGULANT EFFECT OF DABIGATRAN USING IDARUCIZUMAB
PROPHYLAXIS OR TREATMENT OF VENOUS AND ARTERIAL THROMBOTIC DISEASE

indications.text: PRADAXA is indicated to reduce the risk of stroke and systemic embolism in patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
